name: wormhole
description: Evidence-gated planning and orchestration state for AI coding agents.
long_description: Wormhole exposes a local MCP server for evidence records, open-question gates, native context packs, reversible optimization, optimized command execution, local orchestration runs, orchestration task state, graph-first repo indexing and graph artifacts, native media ingestion, shell hook management, discovery-driven tool generation, learned orchestration policy gates, printed-tool execution, native tool generation, deterministic conductor scaffolds, durable behavior policy, external agent dispatch, model-profile traces, typed artifacts, and workbench rendering.

tools.name: mission_start
tools.description: Start an evidence-gated planning mission.

tools.name: round_start
tools.description: Start a gather and reason round.

tools.name: record_evidence
tools.description: Record sourced mission evidence.

tools.name: record_question
tools.description: Record an open question or assumption gap.

tools.name: gate_request
tools.description: Evaluate whether the mission can emit its final plan.

tools.name: emit_plan
tools.description: Emit the evidence-cited Markdown plan.

tools.name: ctx_record
tools.description: Record native source-backed context.

tools.name: ctx_pack_query
tools.description: Query native context records.

tools.name: ctx_pack_create
tools.description: Create a budgeted context pack.

tools.name: ctx_pack_render
tools.description: Render a context pack.

tools.name: optimization_apply
tools.description: Apply reversible native optimization.

tools.name: optimization_retrieve
tools.description: Retrieve original optimized content.

tools.name: optimized_command_run
tools.description: Run a command with reversible output optimization.

tools.name: optimization_stats
tools.description: Read aggregate optimization savings stats.

tools.name: task_register
tools.description: Register a tracked orchestration task.

tools.name: orchestration_plan_local
tools.description: Plan a local adapter-free orchestration run.

tools.name: orchestration_run_local
tools.description: Execute a local deterministic orchestration run from supplied outcomes.

tools.name: agent_register
tools.description: Register an external AI agent or provider worker.

tools.name: agent_dispatch
tools.description: Dispatch a task to a registered external agent.

tools.name: agent_status
tools.description: Read external agent run status.

tools.name: agent_interrupt
tools.description: Interrupt an external agent run when supported.

tools.name: agent_complete
tools.description: Record external agent run completion.

tools.name: printing_press_register
tools.description: Register a Printing Press generated CLI.

tools.name: printing_press_list
tools.description: List registered Printing Press CLIs.

tools.name: printing_press_select
tools.description: Select a Printing Press CLI by capability.

tools.name: printing_press_register_agent
tools.description: Convert a Printing Press CLI into a Wormhole external agent.

tools.name: printing_press_verify
tools.description: Verify a registered printed CLI.

tools.name: printing_press_run
tools.description: Run a registered printed CLI with evidence capture.

tools.name: repo_index_build
tools.description: Build a deterministic local repo graph index.

tools.name: repo_index_query
tools.description: Query the repo graph before broad grep or file reads.

tools.name: repo_index_explain
tools.description: Explain a file or symbol from indexed graph context.

tools.name: repo_index_path
tools.description: Find a graph path between files or symbols.

tools.name: repo_index_report
tools.description: Render a native repo graph report.

tools.name: repo_graph_export
tools.description: Export graph.json, GRAPH_REPORT.md, and graph.html content.

tools.name: python_sidecar_probe
tools.description: Probe the optional Python sidecar runtime.

tools.name: python_graph_metrics
tools.description: Run Python graph metrics over graph nodes and edges.

tools.name: python_graph_communities
tools.description: Run Python graph community analysis.

tools.name: python_trace_summary
tools.description: Summarize model-profile traces through the Python sidecar.

tools.name: media_dependency_report
tools.description: Report optional media extraction dependency availability.

tools.name: media_ingest_pdf
tools.description: Ingest a repo-local PDF into an evidence-ready media record.

tools.name: media_ingest_image
tools.description: Ingest a repo-local image into an evidence-ready media record.

tools.name: shell_hook_discover
tools.description: Discover supported shell hook targets.

tools.name: shell_hook_plan
tools.description: Plan shell hook installation without editing profiles.

tools.name: shell_hook_install
tools.description: Install marker-based shell hooks after explicit apply confirmation.

tools.name: shell_hook_uninstall
tools.description: Uninstall marker-based shell hooks after explicit apply confirmation.

tools.name: shell_hook_verify
tools.description: Verify shell hook marker blocks.

tools.name: discovery_har_import
tools.description: Import HAR entries as redacted endpoint observations.

tools.name: discovery_openapi_import
tools.description: Import OpenAPI specs as endpoint observations and tool specs.

tools.name: discovery_http_crawl
tools.description: Run a bounded same-origin HTTP crawl.

tools.name: discovery_browser_capture
tools.description: Capture browser network observations when optional dependencies are available.

tools.name: discovery_tool_spec_generate
tools.description: Generate deterministic API tool specs from observations.

tools.name: orchestration_trace_record
tools.description: Record an orchestration trace for policy learning.

tools.name: orchestration_dataset_export
tools.description: Export orchestration traces as JSONL.

tools.name: orchestration_policy_train
tools.description: Train an offline orchestration policy.

tools.name: orchestration_policy_evaluate
tools.description: Evaluate an orchestration policy candidate.

tools.name: orchestration_policy_activate
tools.description: Activate a replay-gated orchestration policy.

tools.name: orchestration_policy_get
tools.description: Read active learned orchestration policy metadata.

tools.name: tool_factory_generate
tools.description: Generate deterministic CLI/MCP scaffold files.

tools.name: conductor_plan
tools.description: Create a deterministic conductor scaffold.

tools.name: conductor_replay
tools.description: Replay a conductor trace.

tools.name: behavior_mode_set
tools.description: Set durable brevity and minimality modes.

tools.name: behavior_mode_get
tools.description: Read durable brevity and minimality modes.

tools.name: behavior_apply
tools.description: Apply the current brevity policy to text.

tools.name: behavior_minimality_review
tools.description: Review a plan with the current minimality policy.

tools.name: model_profile_register
tools.description: Register a native model profile.

tools.name: model_profile_select
tools.description: Select a model profile and emit a trace.

tools.name: model_profile_record_outcome
tools.description: Record a model-profile route outcome.

tools.name: model_profile_export_traces
tools.description: Export model-profile route traces.

prompts.name: wormhole_orchestrate
prompts.description: Run a structured Wormhole planning or orchestration mission.
prompts.text:
Use Wormhole for this mission: ${arguments.objective}

Follow the Wormhole loop strictly: mission_start, round_start, gather evidence, record_evidence, record_question for gaps, register tasks when parallel work is useful, use ctx_record and ctx_pack_create for native context packs, use optimization_apply or optimized_command_run when large outputs need reversible compaction, use orchestration_plan_local for local task waves and orchestration_run_local for deterministic local outcomes, gate_request, then emit_plan only after the gate opens. Use repo_index_build and repo_index_query before broad grep or file reads for codebase questions; use repo_index_explain, repo_index_path, repo_index_report, repo_graph_export, python_graph_metrics, and python_graph_communities when relationships matter. Use media_dependency_report, media_ingest_pdf, and media_ingest_image for repo-local PDFs/images. Use shell_hook_plan before shell hook edits and require explicit apply for shell_hook_install or shell_hook_uninstall. Use discovery_har_import, discovery_openapi_import, discovery_http_crawl, discovery_browser_capture, and discovery_tool_spec_generate before generating API tools. Use printing_press_register, printing_press_verify, printing_press_run, printing_press_register_agent, and tool_factory_generate for generated tools when their capabilities match the task. Use model_profile_select, model_profile_record_outcome, conductor_plan, conductor_replay, orchestration_trace_record, orchestration_dataset_export, orchestration_policy_train, orchestration_policy_evaluate, and orchestration_policy_activate when comparing local model profiles or replay-gating orchestration policy. Use behavior_mode_set and behavior_minimality_review when dense output or minimality review is useful.
